name: seo-content-planner
description: Creates comprehensive content outlines and topic clusters for SEO.
capabilities: Generate detailed content outlines with hierarchical structure
Create topic cluster maps with pillar and supporting content
Develop 30-60 day content calendars with publishing schedules
Identify content gaps and opportunities in existing strategies
Map search intent for target keywords
Plan internal linking strategies for topical authority
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. This is a text-based SEO content planning assistant that generates content outlines, topic clusters, and content calendars. No network calls, filesystem access, environment variable usage, or external command execution detected. No security concerns identified.
valueStatement: Create structured content outlines and topic clusters to improve search rankings and build topical authority.
userTitle: Plan SEO Content with Topic Clusters
limitations: Does not perform actual keyword research or search volume analysis
Does not access Google Analytics or SEO tools for data
Cannot analyze existing content for optimization opportunities
Does not guarantee specific search rankings

useCases.title: Blog Content Strategy
useCases.description: Create a comprehensive blog content plan with topic clusters to build topical authority and improve organic search visibility.

useCases.title: Website Content Overhaul
useCases.description: Plan new website content structure including pillar pages and supporting articles for better SEO performance.

useCases.targetUser: Content teams and digital marketing agencies
useCases.title: Content Calendar Planning
useCases.description: Develop a structured content calendar with priorities, word counts, and internal linking targets for consistent publishing.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Content Outline
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a content outline for an article about [TOPIC]. Include introduction, main sections, and conclusion. Target audience is [AUDIENCE]. Primary keyword is [KEYWORD].
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick outline generation for a single article

promptTemplates.title: Topic Cluster Planning
promptTemplates.prompt: Develop a topic cluster around [MAIN TOPIC]. Include one pillar page and 5-7 supporting articles. For each piece, provide title, target keyword, search intent, and key subtopics to cover.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building topical authority with cluster content

promptTemplates.title: Content Calendar Creation
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a 30-day content calendar for [INDUSTRY/NICHE]. Include publishing dates, content titles, target keywords, content types, word count targets, and internal linking opportunities for each post.

promptTemplates.title: Content Gap Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze the following list of existing content topics: [TOPIC LIST]. Identify gaps and suggest 10-15 new content ideas that would strengthen topical authority. Group them into logical topic clusters.
promptTemplates.scenario: Finding content opportunities in existing strategy

bestPractices: Start with comprehensive pillar content before building supporting articles
Map search intent correctly - informational for guides, transactional for product pages
Prioritize content based on search volume and business relevance
antiPatterns: Creating content without clear search intent alignment
Building thin supporting content that does not add value
Ignoring internal linking opportunities in content planning

faq.question: How does this skill help with SEO?
faq.answer: This skill creates structured content plans that align with SEO best practices including topic clusters, search intent mapping, and internal linking strategies.

faq.question: Can this skill perform keyword research?
faq.answer: No, this skill focuses on content planning and structuring. It uses provided keywords but does not access search volume data or keyword tools.

faq.question: What is a topic cluster?
faq.answer: A topic cluster is a group of interlinked content pieces organized around a pillar page. It helps search engines understand your topical authority.

faq.question: How long is the content calendar?
faq.answer: The skill generates 30-60 day content calendars with weekly breakdowns, topic assignments, and publishing priorities.

faq.question: Does this skill write the actual content?
faq.answer: No, this skill creates content outlines and plans. It does not generate full articles or content copy.

faq.question: Can I use this with Claude Code or Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for AI-assisted content creation workflows.
